title: advancements more
description: adds more advancements that should be in vanilla
body:
This datapack alot of new advancements, like "the end." which you get after beating the dragon and exiting the end.


<details>
<summary>all new advancements</summary>

netherite filled: obtain all netherite tools

the end: exit the end

careful: place a block of tnt

in the cloud: get an ender chest

Head collector: obtain all mob heads

the garden awakens: visit the pale garden and take damage from the creaking

ouch: take damage from all bosses

bucket of everything: have all buckets

</details>

datapack version is recommended. 

it should work on most modern versions, due to it being a pretty simple datapack.
